---
title: "Open Repositories 2026"
date: 2026-06-08
author: "Open Repositories"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "Online Open Repositories conference from 8 to 11 June 2026, with slides and recordings published via the Open Repositories Zenodo community."
categories:
  - "Related Topic"
tags:
  - "Repositories"
  - "Open science"
  - "Conference"
proofread: false
image: "images/open-repositories-2026.png"
image-alt: "Homepage of the Open Repositories 2026 online conference"
image-caption: "Screenshot of the Open Repositories 2026 homepage. Source: https://or2026.openrepositories.org/. Rights: Open Repositories."
toc: true
---

<!-- Source: <https://or2026.openrepositories.org/>; materials: <https://zenodo.org/communities/openrepos/records?q=&l=list&p=1&s=10&sort=newest> -->

::: {.callout-note}
This event has already taken place. Any registration information has been disabled and is shown for reference only.
:::

## Details

- Date: 8-11 June 2026
- Location: Online
- Registration: ~~Registration closed~~
- Event page: <https://or2026.openrepositories.org/>
- Programme: <https://www.conftool.net/or2026/index.php?page=browseSessions&print=export&form_date=all&presentations=show>
- Slides and recordings: <https://zenodo.org/communities/openrepos/records?q=&l=list&p=1&s=10&sort=newest>

## About

Open Repositories 2026 was an online conference for the international repository community. The theme was "Open to All? Repositories at the Intersection of People, Practice, and Emerging Technologies".

The programme included pre-conference workshops and roundtable discussions on 8 June, followed by keynotes and presentations from 9 to 11 June. The conference covered open, sustainable, and interoperable repositories, digital research infrastructure, open access, research information systems, scholarly communication, and related repository practice.

Slides, recordings, and other conference materials are expected to be published in the Open Repositories Zenodo community after the conference.
